CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Linda Foster, CSR#13286. (212)
